name: Fashion Studio Multi-Pose Collage
description: High-fashion studio collage featuring same woman in 6-8 different poses wearing black strapless dress, stockings, heels and blazer
input_prompt: fashion studio collage same woman multiple poses black dress stockings heels blazer white background

composition.layout: vertical collage with 6-8 evenly spaced images
composition.consistency: same woman with identical face, body, outfit across all poses

panels.description: standing front-facing full body; expression: neutral; blazer: hanging off the arms
standing back-facing with head turned toward camera; blazer: worn on shoulders; legs: straight
squatting or semi-crouching with one leg forward; expression: sharp gaze toward camera
seated on black chair with legs crossed; blazer: off one shoulder; expression: elegant and composed
seated low with knees bent, body leaning slightly forward; blazer: worn on one arm only
half-body portrait facing camera; shoulders: relaxed; style: clean editorial look

subject.description: woman with slim elegant body, natural proportions, pale to light skin tone, delicate oval face, soft but sharp features

hair.style: long, styled in messy bun with loose strands falling naturally around face

face.features: soft but sharp, large expressive eyes, thin lips

clothing.details: variations: fully worn, draped over one shoulder, hanging off one arm, resting loosely on arms

lighting.setup: large softbox placed in front and slightly to the side
lighting.quality: soft shadows beneath body, even illumination

realism_anchors: realistic fabric texture on dress and stockings

flattened_prompt: high-end fashion editorial studio photo collage 9:16, same woman in 6-8 different poses, slim elegant body pale light skin, delicate oval face large expressive eyes thin lips calm confident expression, long black hair messy bun with loose strands, tight black strapless mini dress sheer black thigh-high stockings pointed-toe black stiletto heels thin black choker, black blazer worn differently in each pose (fully worn, draped shoulder, hanging off arm, on one arm), poses: standing front-facing blazer hanging, back-facing head turned blazer on shoulders, squatting sharp gaze, seated on black chair legs crossed blazer off shoulder, seated low knees bent leaning forward, half-body portrait relaxed shoulders, clean white seamless studio background, soft high-key lighting large softbox soft shadows, ultra HD sharp focus natural skin texture realistic shadows accurate anatomy, vertical fashion collage layout evenly spaced
negative_prompt_flat: inconsistent face, outfit changes, harsh shadows, lens distortion, warped proportions, cartoon, 3d render, blurry

flux.prompt: high-end fashion editorial collage, same woman 6-8 poses, slim elegant pale skin, oval face large eyes thin lips, black hair messy bun loose strands, black strapless mini dress sheer thigh-high stockings stiletto heels thin black choker, black blazer worn differently each pose, poses: standing front blazer hanging, back-facing head turned, squatting sharp gaze, seated chair legs crossed, seated low leaning forward, half-body portrait, white seamless studio, soft high-key lighting softbox, ultra HD sharp focus natural skin realistic shadows, vertical collage evenly spaced, 9:16
flux.negative_prompt: inconsistent face, outfit changes, harsh shadows, lens distortion, cartoon, 3d render, blurry

composition.consistency: Same woman, identical face and outfit across all poses

subject.description: Woman with slim elegant body, natural proportions
subject.skin: Pale to light tone, natural texture

face.features: Soft but sharp, large expressive eyes, thin lips

hair.style: Long, messy bun with loose strands framing face

wardrobe.shoes: Pointed-toe black stiletto heels, thin heels
wardrobe.blazer: Formal black, worn differently in each pose

poses: Standing front-facing full body, neutral expression, blazer hanging off arms
Standing back-facing, head turned toward camera, blazer on shoulders, legs straight
Squatting/semi-crouching, one leg forward, sharp gaze
Seated on black chair, legs crossed, blazer off one shoulder, elegant
Seated low, knees bent, leaning forward, blazer on one arm
Half-body portrait, shoulders relaxed, clean editorial

lighting.setup: Large softbox front and slightly to side
lighting.quality: Soft shadows beneath body, even illumination

camera.negative_constraints: no inconsistent faces, no outfit changes, no harsh shadows, no distortion

midjourney.prompt: fashion editorial collage, same woman 6-8 poses, slim elegant pale skin black hair bun, black strapless mini dress stockings stilettos choker blazer, various poses standing seated squatting, white seamless studio, soft high-key lighting --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Complex multi-pose may require multiple generations for consistency

ideogram.prompt: High-fashion studio photo collage featuring same woman in six to eight different poses, slim elegant body with pale skin and black hair in messy bun, wearing tight black strapless mini dress with sheer thigh-high stockings and stiletto heels, black blazer worn differently in each pose, thin black choker, clean white seamless studio background, soft high-key lighting

recraft.prompt: Fashion editorial collage, same woman multiple poses, black dress stockings heels blazer, white studio background, soft high-key lighting, professional photography

luma.prompt: Fashion studio scene, model moves through various poses, blazer shifts from shoulders to arms, camera captures each elegant position, soft studio lights create gentle shadows, editorial atmosphere
luma.motion_notes: Smooth transitions between poses, blazer movement, subtle expression changes

reve.prompt: High-fashion editorial photography in the style of studio multi-pose campaigns, same model in black ensemble across multiple poses, white seamless background, soft high-key lighting, clean editorial aesthetic

grok-imagine.prompt: Fashion studio collage same woman in 6-8 poses, slim pale skin black hair bun, black strapless dress thigh-high stockings stilettos choker, black blazer worn differently each pose, white seamless background, soft studio lighting

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A high-end fashion editorial photo collage featuring the same woman in 6-8 different poses arranged in a vertical layout. She has a slim elegant body with pale to light skin, a delicate oval face with large expressive eyes and thin lips, and long black hair styled in a messy bun with loose strands falling around her face. Her expression is calm and confident throughout. She wears a tight black strapless mini dress, sheer black thigh-high stockings, pointed-toe black stiletto heels with thin heels, and a thin black choker necklace. A formal black blazer is worn differently in each pose: fully worn, draped over one shoulder, hanging off one arm, or resting loosely on arms. The poses include: standing front-facing with blazer hanging off arms, back-facing with head turned toward camera, squatting with sharp gaze, seated on black chair with legs crossed, seated low leaning forward, and half-body portrait with relaxed shoulders. The background is a clean white seamless studio with soft high-key lighting from a large softbox creating soft shadows. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Consistent face across all poses.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Fashion editorial collage of same woman in 6-8 different poses on white seamless studio background. Slim elegant body, pale skin, black hair in messy bun with loose strands. Wearing tight black strapless mini dress, sheer thigh-high stockings, black stiletto heels, thin black choker. Black blazer worn differently each pose. Poses include standing, seated on chair, squatting, half-body portrait. Soft high-key studio lighting with large softbox. Ultra HD professional fashion photography, consistent identity across all panels. Not distorted, not inconsistent faces.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A fashion editorial photo collage showing the same woman in 6-8 different poses on a white seamless studio background. She has a slim elegant body with pale skin, a delicate oval face with large expressive eyes, and long black hair in a messy bun with loose strands. She wears a tight black strapless mini dress, sheer black thigh-high stockings, pointed-toe black stiletto heels, and a thin black choker. A black blazer is styled differently in each pose. Poses vary from standing front and back views to seated and squatting positions. Soft high-key lighting creates even illumination with soft shadows. Professional fashion photography with consistent identity across all panels.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the outfit color from black to red while keeping the same poses, model identity, and white studio background. Preserve the elegant styling and professional lighting.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed pose descriptions for each panel, specific blazer positions, exact outfit details
2_realism_anchors: 'consistent face across poses', 'natural skin texture', 'realistic fabric texture', 'accurate anatomy'
3_technical_camera: 'professional studio photography', 'ultra HD', 'sharp focus', 'no lens distortion'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents inconsistent faces, outfit changes, distortion
5_spatial_consistency: clear pose positions and compositions for each panel
6_lighting_storytelling: 'soft high-key studio' = clean editorial fashion mood
7_identity_consistency: same woman across all 6-8 poses with identical features
